_readme: Andah language tree data — the single source of truth for the app. Full schema: docs/schema.md. Edit this file freely in VS Code (the running app refreshes itself), or use the in-app forms. The Demovian, Tessic and Varnic families, the Qethar isolate, and all borrowings and timeline events below are DISPOSABLE DEMO content (invented placeholder names, not Andah lore) — replace them wholesale when real families arrive.

languages.name: Proto-Demovian
languages.notes: Demo family root — this whole Demovian family is placeholder content. Delete it (or ask Claude to replace it) when you add real Andah languages.

languages.name: Korvish
languages.notes: Branches off a mid-chain stage (Old Demovian).

languages.name: Portside Creole
languages.notes: Two-parent creole — Demovian grammar over a Tessic trade vocabulary.

languages.name: Proto-Tessic
languages.notes: Second demo family, for cross-family features.

languages.name: Proto-Varnic
languages.notes: Invented placeholder family (Varnic) — added to exercise the timeline, collapse, scrub and borrowing-kind features. Disposable demo content, not Andah lore.

languages.name: Dascic
languages.notes: Extinct Varnic branch — exercises the † marker and a substrate borrowing.

languages.name: Merran Creole
languages.notes: Varnic grammar over a Tessic trade lexicon — a creole with a second parent from another family.

languages.name: Qethar
languages.notes: A living language isolate — its own single-language family, tied to the others only by an areal (sprachbund) borrowing.

events.label: The Long Migration
events.notes: Proto-Varnic and early Tessic speakers spread along the coast.

events.label: The Silver Plague
events.notes: A generation-long epidemic emptied several Dascic towns, accelerating the shift into Middle Varnic.
